sections.draft_text: The Supplier's Quotation includes pricing on the basis of Fixed Price, Outcome Based T&M (capped at a NTE Price), Time and Materials (T&M) (capped at a NTE Price), and a Combination of T&M and Fixed Price. Detailed pricing information is provided in the attached annexes, ensuring compliance with the tender requirements.

The Supplier accepts the draft contract terms and includes a PDF copy of the Supplier's Deed of Undertaking, duly signed, as required by the tender. Any proposed deviations from the draft contract terms are detailed in the attached documentation.

The project management methodology will ensure that all Services are provided in accordance with the Deed and the Work Order, achieving the Milestones and/or Critical Milestones by the relevant Milestone Dates. The governance structure and reporting approach are designed to align with the tender requirements, ensuring transparency and accountability throughout the project lifecycle.

The service management framework includes ITSM processes, SLAs, and escalation paths. Level Zero support is provided by DCD help pages and DSMS Knowledge Articles, with Level One support from the Defence ICT Service Desk. Level Two and Three support is provided by the DDM sustainment team, while Level Four support is available from the manufacturer where applicable.

The Supplier's past performance and technical merit are demonstrated through the following case studies. These case studies highlight our methodology, past performance, technical merit, pricing, and compliance, addressing the evaluation criteria set by the Commonwealth.

The Supplier provides a comprehensive overview of its background, size, structure, and relevance to this opportunity. An AIC Schedule or AIC Plan will be completed and submitted as applicable, in accordance with the tender requirements.

The proposed technical approach addresses the need for remediation of eTools documentation during the software development lifecycle. Our approach ensures that all technical requirements are met, with a focus on maintaining alignment between documentation and the application code base.

Quotations will be lodged electronically via AusTender before the Closing Time, in accordance with the Quotation lodgement procedures set out in this RFQ and on AusTender. This ensures compliance with all submission requirements.
